main.description: Proof-of-payment receipt minted by the bidder in response to a successful x402-gated GET against the bids.x402 url. Returned (by AT-URI + CID) to the requester, which uses it as the payload of the higher-level com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.accept so the bidder can verify payment before provisioning.

accept.description: Strong reference to the com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.accepts.x402 record that this payment settles.

cid.description: badge.blue attestation CID over the referenced accepts.x402 record, making this receipt a remote attestation proof: computed from the accepts.x402 record (signatures stripped), this receipt's metadata (cid/signatures stripped, repository = requester's repo DID added) as $sig, via DAG-CBOR + SHA-256 + CIDv1. Re-binding the proof-of-payment to a copy of the accepts.x402 in another repository fails verification — badge.blue's replay-attack prevention applied to payment receipts.

signatures.description: badge.blue attestations over this receipt. Must include the bidder's inline signature, attached at creation, so the proof-of-payment is non-repudiable.
